query: What demand charges apply to commercial customers with demand >500 kW in Chicago, based on the OpenEI tariffs data? Answer should contain service class name and demand charge for at least 2 classes
final_answer:
# Commonwealth Edison (ComEd) — Commercial Demand Charges for Customers >500 kW in Chicago

Based on the OpenEI IURDB tariff data for **Commonwealth Edison Co (EIA ID: 4110)**, the following active service classes apply to commercial customers with demand exceeding 500 kW. All rates shown are effective from January 1, 2025.

---

## 1. **RDS — Medium Load Delivery Class (Secondary)**
- **OpenEI Label:** `67a250da809958d49f095b5d`
- **Demand Charge:** **$14.94/kW** (flat per kW, applied every month)
- **Voltage:** Secondary
- **Eligibility:** Up to 10,000 kW peak demand (`peakkwcapacitymax`: 10,000)
- **Monthly Customer Charge:** $47.83
- **Source:** [OpenEI rate view](https://apps.openei.org/IURDB/rate/view/67a250da809958d49f095b5d)

## 2. **RDS — Large Load Delivery Class (Secondary)**
- **OpenEI Label:** `67a1068a1f657b662505b680`
- **Demand Charge:** **$14.58/kW** (flat per kW, applied every month)
- **Voltage:** Secondary
- **Monthly Customer Charge:** $183.89
- **Source:** [OpenEI rate view](https://apps.openei.org/IURDB/rate/view/67a1068a1f657b662505b680)

## 3. **RDS — Very Large Load Delivery Class (Secondary)**
- **OpenEI Label:** `67a38c76820ecb5224036aea`
- **Demand Charge:** **$13.10/kW** (flat per kW, applied every month)
- **Voltage:** Secondary
- **Eligibility:** Minimum 1,000 kW peak demand (`peakkwcapacitymin`: 1,000)
- **Monthly Customer Charge:** $154.13
- **Source:** [OpenEI rate view](https://apps.openei.org/IURDB/rate/view/67a38c76820ecb5224036aea)

---

## 4. **RDS — Medium Load Delivery Class (Primary)**
- **OpenEI Label:** `67a250b9809958d49f095b5b`
- **Demand Charge:** **$8.90/kW** (flat per kW, applied every month)
- **Voltage:** Primary
- **Eligibility:** Up to 10,000 kW peak demand
- **Monthly Customer Charge:** $47.83
- **Source:** [OpenEI rate view](https://apps.openei.org/IURDB/rate/view/67a250b9809958d49f095b5b)

---

### Summary Table

| Service Class | Voltage | Demand Charge ($/kW) | Monthly Fixed ($) |
|---|---|---|---|
| Medium Load Delivery | Secondary | **$14.94** | $47.83 |
| Large Load Delivery | Secondary | **$14.58** | $183.89 |
| Very Large Load Delivery (≥1 MW) | Secondary | **$13.10** | $154.13 |
| Medium Load Delivery | Primary | **$8.90** | $47.83 |

> **Key takeaway:** A customer with demand between 500 kW and 1,000 kW would most likely be on the **Medium Load Delivery Class (Secondary)** at **$14.94/kW** or the **Large Load Delivery Class (Secondary)** at **$14.58/kW**, depending on usage characteristics and negotiated contract terms. For customers taking service at primary voltage, the Medium Load rate drops to **$8.90/kW**. The bundled (BES) variants of each class carry the same demand charges but include Standard Offer supply energy charges.

**Data source:** OpenEI IURDB via [ComEd's Rate Tariffs](https://www.comed.com/MyAccount/MyBillUsage/Pages/CurrentRatesTariffs.aspx)
